EnglishDescription: Raise your hands, having in mind the enemies of Ahlulbai (a.s) and recite…
RUrduDescription: Apne haatho’n ko buland kare aur Ahlebait (a.s) ke dushmano ka tasawwur karte huwe padhe…
UrduDescription: اپنے ہاتھوں کو بلند کرے اور اہل ِبیتؑ کے دشمنوں کو تصور کرتے ہوئے کہے۔۔۔

English: In the Name of Allah, the most Gracious, the most Merciful.
RUrdu: (Shuru karta hu) Allah ke naam se Jo bada maher-baan nehaayat rahem karne waala hai.
Urdu: اللہ کے نام سے (شروع کرتا ہوں) جو بڑا مہربا ن نہایت رحم کرنے والا ہے۔

English: O my Allah! Indeed a great many among the people declared war, laid traps and intrigued against the careful and gentle guardians who observed and fulfilled the duty. The ungratefulls (the said opponents) renounced the faith and did not, in fact, believe in the “Kalimah” (La ilaaha illallah); attached themselves to the trend setters of disorder and tyranny; disowned and gave up the Book and the (Divine) rule of life; swerved from and angled off the two strings which according to Thy commandment, (they) should have held fast and stuck close by; undermined and twisted the truth; Went, away from the real purpose, in the opposite direction; encouraged partisanship; Altered and falsified the Book; refused to believe in the evident proof and rightful claim, whenever confronted face to face; chose falsehood, whenever came across; lost their way and corrupted Thy laws, Islam; led people astray; killed the children of Thy Prophet, Thy liberal high-minded servants, bearers of Thy knowledge, inheritors of Thy wisdom and revelation, the Book.
Urdu: انشاء اللہ ترجمہ جلد آرہا ہے
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA INNA KASEE-RAN MENAL UMMATE NAASABA-TIL MUS-TAHFE-ZEENA MENAL WA KAFA-RAT BIL KALEMATE WA A’KAFAT A’LAL QAADA-TIZ ZALAMA-TE WA HAJARA-TIL KETAABA WAS-SUNNATE WA A’DA-LAT A’NIL HAB-LAIY-NIL LAZEE-NA AMAR-TA BE-TAA-A’TE-HEMAA WAT TAMAS-SOKE BE-HEMAA FA-AMAA-TATIL HAQQA WA HAADAT A’NIL QASDE WA MAA LA-A-TIL AHZAA-BA WA HARRA-FATIL KETAABA WA KAFAR-TA BIL HAQQE LAMMAA JAAA-A-HAA WA TAMASSA-KAT BIL BAATELE LAMMA’ TARAZA-HAA WA ZAIYYA-A’T HAQQA-KA WA AZAL-LAT KHALQA-KA WA QATALAT AWLAA-DA NABIYYA-KA WA KHEYA-RATA E’BAADA-KA WA HAMALA-TA I’LME-KA WA WARASA-TE HIKMATE-KA WA WAHYE-KA.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ اِنَّ کَثِیْرًا مِّنَ الْاُمَّۃِ نَاصَبَتِ الْمُسْتَحْفِظِیْنَ مِنَ الْاَئِمَّۃِ وَکَفَرَتْ بِالْکَلِمَۃِ وَعَکَفَتْ عَلَی الْقَادَۃِ الظَّلَمَۃِ وَھَجَرَتِ الْکِتَابَ وَالسُّنَّۃِ وَعَدَلَتْ عَنِ الْحَبْلَیْنِ الَّذِیْنَ اَمَرْتَ بِطَاعَتِھِمَا وَالتَّمَسُّکِ بِھِمَا فَاَمَاتَتِ الْحَقَّ وَحَادَتْ عَنِ الْقَصْدِ وَمَالَئَتِ الْاَحْزَابَ وَحَرَّفَتِ الْکِتَابَ وَکَفَرْتَ بِالْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآئَھَا وَتَمَسَّکَتْ بِالْبَاطِلِ لَمَّا اعْتَرَضَہَا وَضَیَّعَتْ حَقَّکَ وَاَضَلَّتْ خَلْقَکَ وَقَتَلَتْ اَوْلَادَ نَبِیَّکَ وَخِیَرَۃَ عِبَادَکَ وَحَمَلَۃَ عِلْمِکَ وَوَرَثَۃِ حِکْمَتِکَ وَوَحْیِکَ۔

English: O my Allah, upset and overturn the plan and movement of Thy enemies, (who are also) the enemies of Thy Messenger and the children of Thy Messenger. O my Allah, put a stop to the spread of their sphere of influence; make their equipment and men unserviceable, their expression confused and contradictory; break up their support; crack up their strategy; lay hold upon them, hit and cut off by Thy one sharp strike; throw them down, frightened by Thy hard unnerving barrier, bury them under the swallowing mud of disasters; let them be mean and contemptible under the yoke of despise-able penance; bring them to book and let them have the taste of a hard and sharp retribution; fester them with definite and exemplary punishment, as Thou wipes out Thy enemies; it is beyond the shadow of doubt that Thou cracks down upon the criminals.
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA FA-ZALZIL AQDAMA A’DAA-E-KA WA A’DAA-E RASOOLE-KA WA AHLE-BAIYTE RASOOLE-KA. ALLAAHUMMA WA AKHRIB DEYAA-RA HAM WAFLOOL SELAAHA-HUM WA KHAALIF BAIYNA KALEMATE-HIM WA FUTTA FEE A’ZAADE-HIM WA AWHIN KAIYDA-HUM WAZRIB-HUM BE-SAIYFE-KAL QAATE-E’ WA ARME-HIM BE-HAJARE-KAD DAAME-GHE WA TUMMA-HUM BIL-BALAAA-E TAMMAA WA GHUMMA-HUM BIL-BALAAA-E GHAMMAN WA A’ZZIB-HUM A’ZAA-BAN NUKRAN WA KHUZ-HUM BIS-SENEENA WAL MASO-LAATIL LATEE AHLAK-TA BEHAA A’DAA-A-KA INNAKA ZOO-NIKMA-TIN MENAL MUJRE-MEENA.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ فَزَلْزِلْ اَقْدَمَ اَعْدَٓئِکَ وَاَعْدَآئِ رَسُوْلِکَ وَاَھْلِبَیْتِ رَسُوْلِکَ۔ اَللّٰہُمَّ وَاَخْرِبْ دِیَارَ ھُمْ وَافْلُلْ سِلَاحَھُمْ وَخَالِفْ بَیْنَ کَلِمَتِھِمْ وَفُتَّ فِیْ اَعْضَادِھِمْ وَاَوْھِنْ کَیْدَ ھُمْ وَاضْرِبْھُمْ بِسَیْفِکَ الْقَاطِعِ وَاَرْمِھِمْ بِحَجَرِکَ الدّٰمِغِ وَطُمَّہُمْ بِالْبَلَآئِ طَمَّا وَغُمَّہُمْ بِالْبَلَآئِ غَمًّا وَّعَذِّبْھُمْ عَذَابًا نُّکْرًا وَّخُذْھُمْ بِالسِّنِیْنَ وَالْمَثُلَاتِ الَّتِیْ اَھْلَکْتَ بِھَا اَعْدَآئَکَ اِنَّکَ ذُوْنِقْمَۃٍ مِّنَ الْمُجْرِمِیْنَ۔

English: O my Allah, the way of life approved by Thee has been tossed aside; Thy code of law has been suspended; and the descendants of the Prophet; in this world, had been tormented. O my Allah, Therefore give all Thy attention and care to signify truth, and the upholders of truth; restrain and prevent falsehood, and the camp-followers of false-hood, and take us to safety as a favour; guide us to true faith; make available for us, as soon as possible, happiness and bliss, bring everything in to good order through the inspiring presence of Thy representatives; make us desire and love them, make them receive us with open arms. O my Allah, bring to nothing those who celebrate the day the choicest (grand) son of Thy Prophet was martyred, in cheerful amusement; laugh and enjoy in utter delight and indulge in wanton boisterous merriment; catch hold of and punish each one of the remaining, just as Thou cracked down on the early (culprits); make twice as much the penalty.
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA INNA SUNNATA-KA ZAAA-E-A’TOON WA AH-KAAMA-KA MO-A’TTALA-TOON WA ITRA-TA NABIYYE-KA FIL ARZE HAA-E-MATOON. ALLAAHUMMA FAA-E’NIL HAQQA WA AHLA-HU WAQMA-I’L BAATE-LA WA AHLA-HU WA MUNNA A’LAIY-NAA BIN-NAJAATE WAHDE-NAA ILAL IMAANE WA A’JJIL FARAJA-NAA WA ANZIM-HO BE-FARAJE AWLIYAAA-E-KA WAJ-A’L-HUM LANAA WUDDAN WAJ-A’L-NAA LAHUM WAFDAN.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ اِنَّ سُنَّتَکَ ضَآئِعَۃٌ وَّاَحْکَامَکَ مُعَطَّلَۃٌ وَّعِتْرَۃَ نَبِیِّکَ فِی الْاَرْضِ ھَآئِمَۃٌ۔ اَللّٰہُمَّ فَاعِنِ الْحَقَّ وَاَھْلَہٗ وَقْمَعِ الْبَاطِلَ وَاَھْلَہٗ وَمُنَّ عَلَیْنَا بِالنَّجَاۃِ وَاھْدِنَا اِلَا الْاِیْمَانِ وَعَجِّلْ فَرَجَنَا وَاَنْظِمْہُ بِفَرَجِ اَوْلِیَآئِکَ وَاجْعَلْہُمْ لَنَا وُدًّا وَّاجْعَلْنَا لَھُمْ وَفْدًا۔

English: O my Allah, and punishment, a warning example, while convicting the tyrants who took liberties with and abused the children of Thy Prophet; give the earth blow to their henchmen, put an end to their headmen, wipe out their patrons and their groups altogether. O my Allah, multiply Thy blessings generously, Thy mercy liberally, Thy favours like a windfall, (thou bestows) upon the children of Thy Prophet, who Thy enemies tried to ignore, frighten and corner, the children who are the blooming pride of the fragrant strongly grown and fertile tree. Let people subscribe to and uphold.
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA WA AHLIK MAN JA-A’LA YAWMA QATLE IBNE BINTE MOHAMMADIN NABIYYE-KA WA KHEYA-RATE-KA EE’DAN WASTA-HALLA BEHI FARA-HAN WA-KHUZ AAKHERA-HUM KAMAA A-KHAZ-TA AWWALA-HUM WA ZAA-I’F. ALLAAHUMMAL A’ZAABA WAT-TAN-KILA A’LAA ZAALE-MEE AHLE-BAIYTE NABIYYE-KA WA AHLE-KA ASHYAA-A’HUM WA QAADATA-HUM WA ABIR-HEMAATA-HUM WA JAMAA A’TA-HUM.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ وَاَھْلِکْ مَنْ جَعَلَ یَوْمَ قَتْلِ اِبْنِ بِنْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ نَّبِیِّکَ وَخِیَرَتِکَ عِیْدًا وَّاسْتَھَلَّ بِہٖ فَرَحًا وَّمَرَحًا وَّخُذْ اٰخِرَھُمْ کَمَا اَخَذْتَ اَوَّلَہُمْ وَضَاعِفْ۔ اَللّٰہُمَّ الْعَذَابَ وَالتَّنْکِیْلَ عَلٰی ظَالِمِیْ اَھْلِبَیْتِ نَبِیِّکَ وَاَھْلِکَ اَشْیَاعَہُمْ وَقَادَتَھُمْ وَاَبِرْحِمَاتَہُمْ وَجَمَاعَتَہُمْ۔

English: O my Allah, their expressed refined (thoughts), and get the better of the antagonists in debate and disputations through their arguments, put the dark clouds of trouble, distress nothingness and ignorance, to flight, through (on account of) them, make firm and strong the hearts and minds of their followers (to know things for certain and give correct answers), to belong to Thy party, obedient to Thee; to love them; to support them; stand by them, signify them; they exercised self-control whenever they put up with damage and injury in Thy cause; bring in, for them, the days, people will see them and find them among themselves to pronounce the profession of true faith, a blissful and happy time; Be quick in providing relief and joy, after a long period of suffering (to them and us), on account of their presence; bring on their worthy, decent and refined sphere of influence; and support them as Thou has given a guarantee in this connection in Thy revealed Book; Thou said, (and Thy words are always true).
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA ZAA-I’F SALAWAATE-KA WA RAHMATE-KA WA BARA-KAATE-KA A’LAA I’TRA-TE NABIYYE-KAL I’TRA-TIZ ZAAA-E-E’TIL KHAA-E-FATIL MUSTA-ZIL LATE BE-QIYYA-TIN MENASH SHAJARA-TIT TAIYYE-BATIZ ZAKIYYA-TIL MOBAARA-KATE WA A’LE.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ ضَاعِفْ صَلَوَاتِکَ وَرَحْمَتِکَ وَبَرَکَاتِکَ عَلٰی عِتْرَۃِ نَبِیِّکَ الْعِتْرَۃِ الضَّآئِعِۃِ الْخَآئِفَۃِ الْمُسْتَذِ لَّۃِ بِقِیَّۃٍ مِّنَ الشَّجَرَۃِ الطَّیِّبَۃِ الزَّکِیَّۃِ الْمُبَارَکَۃِ وَاَعْلِ۔

English: Allah has promised such of you as believe and do good deed that He will surely appoint them successors in the earth, as He appointed successors those before them, and that He will surely establish for them Their religion which He has chosen for them, and surely He will give them in exchange safety after their fear. Thy (shall) ascribe nothing as partner unto Me.
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA KALEMATA-HUM WA AFLIZ HUJJATA-HUM WAKSHE-FIL BALAA-A WAL-LAAWAA-A WA HANAADE-SAL ABAA-TILA WAL A’MAA A’N-HUM WA SABBIT QOLOOBA SHEE-A’TE-HIM WA HIZNE-KA A’LAA TAA-A’TE-KA WA WELAAYATE-HIM WA NUSRATE-HIM WA MAWAALAATE-HIM WA A-I’N-HUM WAMNAH-HOMUS SABRA A’LAL AZAA FEEKA WAJ-A’L LAHUM AYYAA-MAN MASHHOO DATAN WA AW-QAATAN MAHMOO-DATAN TOOSHE-KA FEE-HAA FARAJA-HUM WA TOO-JEBO FEE-HAA TAMKEENA-HUM WA NASARA-HUM KAMAA ZEMINTA LE-AWLIYAA-E-KA FEE KETAABE-KAL MUZALE FA-INNA-KA QULTA WA QAWLO-KAL HAQQO.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ کَلِمَتَھُمْ وَاَفْلِجْ حُجَّتَھُمْ وَاکْشِفِ الْبَلَآئَ وَاللَّاوَآئَ وَحَنَادِسَ الْاَبَاطِیْلَ وَالْعَمٰی عَنْہُمْ وَ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوْبَ شِیْعَتِھِمْ وَحِزْنِکَ عَلٰی طَاعَتِکَ وَوِلَایَتِھِمْ وَنُصْرَتِھِمْ وَمُوَالَاتِہِمْ وَاَعِنْھُمْ وَامْنَحْھُمُ الصَّبْرَ عَلَی الْاَذٰی فِیْکَ وَاجْعَلْ لَّھُمْ اَیَّامًا مَّشْہُوْ دَۃً وَّاَوْقَاتًا مَّحْمُوْدَۃً مَّسْعُوْدَۃً تُوْشِکَ فِیْہَا فَرَجَہُمْ وَتُوْجِبُ فِیْہَا تَمْکِیْنَہُمْ وَنَصَرَھُمْ کَمَا ضِمِنْتَ لِاَوْلِیَآئِکَ فِیْ کِتَابِکَ الْمُنْزَلِ فَاِنَّکَ قُلْتَ وَقَوْلُکَ الْحَقُّ۔

English: O my Allah! Therefore disperse the dark clouds hanging over them, no one has power to keep safe from pair and distress save He, O Unique! O Single! O Everliving! O Self-subsisting! I, O my Allah, Thy bondman, cautions and (always) aware of Thy just requital, turn to Thee with a request, standing before Thee, to seek the favour of taking refuge with Thee, in Thy courtyard, fully aware of the fact that there is no way to run away from Thee except unto Thee. O my Allah, accede to my request, take notice of my positive statement and heartfelt secret avowal, O my Allah, and let me be the one whose conduct satisfies Thee, (whose) pious life devoted to Thee receives Thy approval, (whom) Thou brings to a place of safety through Thy mercy; verily Thou art rare, dear and beloved (because of) Thy kindness.
RArabic: WA A’DAL-LAAHUL LAZEE-NA AAMANOO MINKUM WA A’ME-LUS SAALE-HAATE LA-YAS-TAKHLE-FANNA-HUM FIL ARZE KAMAS TAKHLA-FAL LAZEENA MIN QABLE-HIM WA LA-YOMAKKE-NANNA LAHOMO DEENA-HOMUL LAZEE ARTA-ZAA LAHUM WA LA-YO-BADDE LANNA-HUM MIB BA’DE KHAWFE-HIM AMNAN YA’BODOO-NANEE LAA YUSHRE-KOONA BEE SHAI-AN.
ArabicText1: وَعَدَ اللہُ الَّزِیْنَ اٰمَنُوْا مِنْکُمْ وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَیَسْتَخْلِفَنَّہُمْ فِیْ الْاَرْضِ کَمَا اسْتَخْلَفَ الَّذِیْنَ مِنْ قَبْلِہِمْ وَلَیُمَکِّنَنَّ لَھُمُ دِیْنَہُمُ الَّذِیْ اَرْتَضٰی لَہُمْ وَلَیُبَدِّ لَنَّہُمْ مِبْ بَعْدِ خَوْفِہِمْ اَمْنًا یَّعْبُدُوْ نَنِیْ لَا یُشْرِکُوْنَ بِیْ شَیْئًا۔

English: O my Allah, send blessings, in the beginning and at the end, on Muhammad and on the children of Muhammad; keep at peace at all times, Muhammad and the children of Muhammad, let Thy love and tenderness always envelop Muhammad and the children of Muhammad, more thoroughly and decisively than Thou had blessed, kept at peace and loved Thy Prophets, Messengers, Angels and the bearers of Thy Arsh, in the name of and for the sake of “LAA ILAAHA ILLAA ANTA”.
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA FAK-SHIF GHUMMATA-HUM YAA MAN LAA YAMLE-KO KASH-FAZ ZURRIL AHO-WA YAA WAAHEDO YAA AHADO YAA HAIYYO YAA QAIYYUMO WA ANAA YAA ILAAHEE A’BDO-KAL KHAA-E-FO MINKA WAR RAAJE-O’ ILAI-KAS SAA-E-LO LAKAL MUQBE-LO A’LAI-KAL LAAJE-O ILAA FANAA-E-KA AL-AA’LEMO BE-ANNA-HU LAA MALJAA MINKA ILLAA ILAIKA.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ فَاکْشِفْ غُمَّتَہُمْ یَامَنْ لَّا یَمْلِکُ کَشْفَ الضُّرِّ الِّاَھُوَ یَاوَاحِدُ یَااَحَدُ یَاحَیُّ یَاقَیُّوْمُ وَاَنَا یَااِلٰھِیْ عَبْدُکَ الْخَآئِفُ مِنْکَ وَالرَّاجِعُ اِلَیْکَ السَّآئِلُ لَکَ الْمُقْبِلُ عَلَیْکَ الَّا جِیُٔ اِلٰی فَنَآئِکَ اَلْعَالِمُ بِاَنَّہٗ لَا مَلْجَأَ مِنْکَ اِلَّا اِلَیْکَ۔

English: O my Allah, let there be no separation (ever) between me and Muhammad and the children of Muhammad, Thy blessings be on him and them; let me be one among the friends and followers of Muhammad, Ali, Fatimah, Hasan and Hussain, and their pure and select descendants; give me the insight to cling to their friendship, and be always ready to walk with them, and make use of their life style; Verily Thou art liberal, Generous and Kind.
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA FAQBAL DO-AA’-EE WAS-MA’ NEDAA-EE YAA ILAAHEE A’LAA NIYYATEE WA NAJWAA-YA WAJ-A’LNEE MIMMAN RAZEE-TA A’MALA-HU WA QABEEL-TA NOSOKA-HU WA NAJ-JAIYTA-HU BE-REHMATE-KA INNA-KA ANTAL A’ZEE-ZUL KAREEMO.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ فَاقْبَلْ دُعَآئِیْ وَاسْمَعْ نِدَآئِیْ یَااِلٰھِیْ عَلَانِیَّتِیْ وَنَجْوَایَ وَاجْعَلْنِیْ مِمَّنْ رَّضَیْتَ عَمَلَہٗ وَقَبِلْتَ نُسُکَہٗ وَنَجَّیْتَہٗ بِرَحْمَتِکَ اِنَّکَ اَنْتَ الْعَزِیْزُ الْکَرِیْمُ۔

English: O my Allah, send blessings, in the beginning and at the end, on Muhammad and on the children of Muhammad; keep at peace at all times, Muhammad and the children of Muhammad, let Thy love and tenderness always envelop Muhammad and the children of Muhammad, more thoroughly and decisively than Thou had blessed, kept at peace and loved Thy Prophets, Messengers, Angels and the bearers of Thy Arsh, in the name of and for the sake of “Laa Ilaaha Illaa anta”.
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA WA SALLE AWWALAN WA AAKHERAN A’LAA MOHAMMADIW WA AALE MOHAMMADIN WA BAARIK A’LAA MOHAMMADIW WA AALE MOHAMMADIN WAR-HAM MOHAMMADAW WA AALE MOHAMMADIN BE-AKMA-LE WA AFZA-LE MAA SALLAIY-TA WA BAARAK-TA WA TARAH-HAMTA A’LAA ANBIYAA-E-KA WA ROSOLE-KA WA MALAA-E-KATE-KA WA HAMALA-TA A’R-SHE-KA BELAA ILAAHA ILLAA ANTA.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ وَصَلِّ اَوَّلًا وَّاٰخِرًا عَلٰی مُحَمَّدٍ وَّاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّبَارِکْ عَلٰی مُحَمَّدٍ وَّاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّارْحَمْ مُحَمَّدًا وَّاٰلَ مُحَمَّدٍ بِاَکْمَلِ وَاَفْضَلِ مَا صَلَّیْتَ وَبَارَکْتَ وَتَرَحَّمْتَ عَلٰی اَنْبِیَآئِکَ وَرُسُلِکَ وَمَلَآئِکَتِکَ وَحَمَلَۃَ عَرْشِکَ بِلَا اِلٰہَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ۔

English: O my Allah, let there be no separation (ever) between me and Muhammad and the children of Muhammad, Thy blessings be on him and them; let me be one among the friends and followers of Muhammad, Ali, Fatimah, Hasan and Hussain, and their pure and select descendants; give me the insight to cling to their friendship, and be always ready to walk with them, and make use of their life style; Verily Thou art liberal, Generous and Kind.
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA WA LAA TO-FARRIQ BAIY-NEE WA BAIYNA MOHAMMADIW WA AALE MOHAMMADIN SALAWAATO-KA A’LAIHE WA A’LAI-HIM WAJ-A’LNEE YAA MAWLAAYA MIN SHEE-A’TE MOHAMMADIW WA A’LIYYIN WA FAATEMA-TA WAL HASANE WAL HUSAINE WA ZURRIY-YATE-HEMUT TAAHERA-TIL MUN-TAJABA-TE WA WAHAB LEYAT TAMASSO-KA BE-HUBBE-HIM WAR-REZAA BE-SABEELE-HIM WAL AKHZA BE-TAREE-QATE-HIM INNA-KA JAWAA-DOON KAREE-MOON.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ وَلَا تُفَرِّقْ بَیْنِیْ وَبَیْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَوَاتُکَ عَلَیْہِ وَعَلَیْھِمْ وَاجْعَلْنِیْ یَامَوْلَایَ مِنْ شِیْعَۃِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّعَلِیٍّ وَّفَاطِمَۃَ وَالْحَسَنِ وَالْحُسَیْنِ وَذُرِّیَّتِہِمُ الطَّاھِرَۃِ الْمُنْتَجَبَۃِ وَوَھَبْ لِیَ التَّمَسُّکَ بِحُبِّھِمْ وَالرِّضَا بِسَبِیْلِھِمْ وَالْاَخْذَ بِطَرِیْقَتِھِمْ اِنَّکَ جَوَادٌ کَرِیْمٌ۔

EnglishDescription: Now go into prostration (Sajdah), keep either side of your face on the earth, one after the other, and say…
RUrduDescription: Ab Sajdeh mein jaaye, aur apne rukhsaaro ko ek ke baad ek mitti (earth) par rakhe aur kahe…
UrduDescription: اب سجدہ میں جائے اور اپنے رخساروں کو ایک کے بعد ایک خاک پر رکھے اور کہے۔۔۔

English: O He who decrees that which He wills, does that which He wants. It is Thou who possesses and exercises absolute power; therefore (all) praise is for Thee (only); (Thou alone art) the praiseworthy, the thankworthy. O my Master, let them have a life full of love and peace, and let us share the harmony and bliss with them, because Thou has given a guarantee to put them on the highest pedestal of love, honour and wisdom, after the severest trial and tribulation, to do too much for them, exceeding all bounds, after they had put up with the worldly minimum (in Thy cause), to make them distinct and evident after (Thy enemies) kept them in obscurity, O the Most Truthful! O the Most Merciful!
Urdu: انشاء اللہ ترجمہ جلد آرہا ہے
RArabic: YAA MAN YAH-KOMO MAA YASHAA-O WA YAF-A’LO MAA YOREE-DO ANTA HAKIM-TA FA-LAKAL HAMDO MAHMOO-DAN MASHKOO-RAN FA-A’JJIL YAA MAWLAAYA FARAJA-HUM WA FARAJA-NAA BE-HIM FA-INNA-KA ZAMIN-TA E’ZAAZA-HUM BA’DAZ ZALLA-TE WA TAKSEERA-HUM BA’DAL QILLA-TE WA IZHAARA-HUM BA’DAL KHOMOO-LE YAA AS-DA-QAS SAADE-QEENA WA YAA AR-HAMAR RAAHE-MEENA.
ArabicText1: یَامَنْ یَّحْکُمُ مَا یَشَآئُ وَیَفْعَلُ مَا یُرِیْدُ اَنْتَ حَکَمْتَ فَلَکَ الْحَمْدُ مَحْمُوْدًا مَّشْکُوْرًا فَعَجِّلْ یَامَوْلَایَ فَرَجَھُمْ وَفَرَجَنَا بِہِمْ فَاِنَّکَ ضَمِنْتَ اِعْزَازَھُمْ بَعْدَ الذَّلَّۃِ وَتَکْثِیْرَھُمْ بَعْدَ الْقِلَّۃِ وَاِظْھَارَھُمْ بَعْدَ الْخُمُوْلِ یَااَصْدَقَ الصَّادِقِیْنَ وَیَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِیْنَ۔

English: I beseech Thee, O my Lord, and Master, humble and weak before Thee, to throw wide open doors of Thy generosity and kindness to let my hope (of fulfillment of heart‘s desires) come true, and get and gather what I want in surplus; and make valid my deeds, whether insignificant looking or weighty, prolong my days until I am satisfied with being an eye-witness, and give testimony, and be among those who are called upon, so run to obey them, love them and support them (the descendants of the Holy Prophet); Make me see that very soon, close at hand, in good health sound mind and with believing heart. Verily Thou art able to do all things.
RArabic: FAS-ALOKA YAA ILAAHEE WA SAYYEDEE MOTAZARRA-A’N ILAIKA BE-JOODE-KA WA KARAME-KA BASATA AMALEE WAT-TAJAAWO-ZA A’NNEE WA QABOOLA QALEELE A’MALEE WA KASEERE-HI WAZ ZIYAAADA-TE FEE AYYAA-MEE WA TABLI-GHEE ZAALE-KAL MASHHADA WA AN TAJA-A’LA-NEE MIMMAN YUD-AA’ FA-YOJEE-BO ILAA TAA-A’TE-HIM WA MAWAALATE-HIM WA NASRE-HIM WA TOREE-NANEE ZAALEKA QAREE-BAN SAREE-A’N FEE AA’FE-YATIN INNA-KA A’LAA KULLE SHAI-IN QADEE-ROON.
ArabicText1: فَاسْئَلُکَ یَااِلٰھِیْ وَسَیِّدِیْ مُتَضَرَّعًا اِلَیْکَ بِجُوْدِکَ وَکَرَمِکَ بَسَطَ اَمَلِیْ وَالتَّجَاوُزَ عَنِّیْ وَقَبُوْلَ قَلِیْلِ عَمَلِیْ وَکَثِیْرِہٖ وَالزِّیَادَۃِ فِیْ اَیَّامِیْ وَتَبْلِیْغِیْ ذٰلِکَ الْمَشْھَدَ وَاَنْ تَجْعَلَنِیْ مِمَّنْ یُّدْعٰی فَیُجِیْبُ اِلٰی طَاعَتِھِمْ وَمُوَالَاتِہِمْ وَنَصْرِھِمْ وَتُرِیْنَنِیْ ذٰلِکَ قَرِیْبًا سَرِیْعًا فِیْ عَافِیَۃٍ اِنَّکَ عَلٰی کُلِّ شَيْٓءٍ قَدِیْرٌ۔

EnglishDescription: Raise your head, look towards the sky and say…
RUrduDescription: Apne sar ko uthaaye aur apne chehra aasmaan ki taraf karke kahe…
UrduDescription: اپنے چہرے کو آسمان کی طرف بلند کرے اور کہے۔۔۔

English: In Thee do I seek refuge that I should be among those who hope not for Thy “Days”, so make me full well and be there, O my Master, through Thy mercy, in that time.
Urdu: انشاء اللہ ترجمہ جلد آرہا ہے
RArabic: A-OO’ZO BEKA AN AKOONA MENAL LAZEE-NA LAA YAR-JOONA AYYAAMA-KA FA-A-I’Z-NEE YAA ILAA-HEE BE-RAHMATE-KA MIN ZAALEKA.
ArabicText1: اَعُوْذُ بِکَ اَنْ اَکُوْنَ مِنَ الَّذِیْنَ لَا یَرْجُوْنَ اَیَّامَکَ فَاَعِذْنِیْ یَآاِلٰھِیْ بِرَحْمَتِکَ مِنْ ذٰلِکَ۔

RUrduDescription: Phir 10 martaba is tarah se kahe…
UrduDescription: پھر ۱۰ مرتبہ اس طرح سے کہے۔۔۔

Urdu: انشاء اللہ ترجمہ جلد آرہا ہے
RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA SALLE A’LAA MOHAMMADIW WA AALE MOHAMMADIN WA SALLIM A’LAA JAMEE-I’L AMBIYAA-E WAL MURSA-LEENA. SUBHAANAL LAAHE MALA-AL MIZAANE WA MUNTA-HAL I’LME WA MABLA-GHAR REZAA WA ZENA-TAL A’RSHE WAS-SE-A’TAL KURSIYYE LAA MALJAA WA LAA MANJAA MENAL LAAHE ILLAA ILAIKA.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰی مُحَمَّدٍ وَّاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّسَلِّمْ عَلٰی جَمِیْعِ الْاَنْۢبِیَآئِ وَالْمُرْسَلِیْنَ۔ سُبْحَانَ اللہِ مَلَاَ الْمِیْزَانِ وَمُنْتَھَی الْعِلْمِ وَمَبْلَغَ الرِّضَا وَزِنَۃَ الْعَرْشِ وَسِّعَۃَ الْکُرْسِیِّ لَا مَلْجَا وَلَا مَنْجَا مِنَ اللہِ اِلَّااِلَیْہِ۔

RArabic: SUBHAANAL LAAHE A’DADA LASH-SHAF-E’ WAL WITRA WA A’DADA KALE-MAATE-HIT TA-AAMMAA-TE KULLE-HAA AS-ALO-HUS SALAAMATA BE-RAHMATE-HI WA LAA HAWLA WA LAA QUWWATA ILLAA BIL-LAAHIL A’LIYYIL A’ZEEME WA HOWA HASBEE WA NE’MAL WAKEELO WA NE’MAL MAWLAA WA NE’MAN NASEERO WA SALLAL LAAHO A’LAA MOHAMMADIW WA AALE-HI WA SALLAM A’LAA JAMEE-I’L ANBIYAA-E WA MURSA-LEENA WAQZE HAAJAA-TEE FID DUNYAA WAL AAKHERA-TE U’MREE FEE TAA-A’TE-KA WA REZAA BE-RAHMATE-KA YAA AR-HAMAR RAAHE-MEENA.
ArabicText1: سُبْحَانَ اللہِ عَدَدَا لَشَّفْعِ وَالْوِتْرِ وَعَدَدَ کَلِمَاتِہِ التَّآمَّآتِ کُلِّھَا اَسْئَلُہُ السَّلَامَۃَ بِرَحْمَتِہٖ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّۃَ اِلَّابِاللہِ الْعَلِیِّ الْعَظِیْمِ وَھُوَ حَسْبِیْ وَنِعْمَ الْوَکِیْلُ وَنِعْمَ الْمَوْلٰی وَنِعْمَ النَّصِیْرُ وَصَلَّ اللہُ عَلٰی مُحَمَّدٍ وَّاٰلِہٖ وَسَلِّمْ عَلٰی جَمِیْعِ الْاَنْبِیَآئِ وَالْمُرْسَلِیْنَ وَاقْضِ حَاجَاتِیْ فِی الدُّنْیَا وَلْاٰخِرَۃِ وَطَوِّلْ عُمْرِیْ فِیْ طَاعَتِکَ وَرِضَا بِرَحْمَتِکَ یَااَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِیْنَ۔

English: Allah’s (s.w.t) choicest blessings be upon Mohammed and his holy progeny.
RUrdu: Parwardigaar Tu rehmat naazil farma Hazrat Muhammad (s.a.w.a) aur unki Aal (a.s) par.
Urdu: اے معبود! رحمت نازل فرما حضرت محمدؐ اور انکی آل ؑپر۔
RArabic: ALLAHUMMA SWALLE ALAA MUHAMMADIW WA AALE MUHAMMADIN
ArabicText1: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ۔
